'''chalotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:graciosity|graciosity]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-l-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:graciosity|graciosity]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chalotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæletheth|chæletheth]] || [[word:chælethej|chælethej]] || [[word:chælethesh|chælethesh]] || [[word:chælethe|chælethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chalolothoth|chalolothoth]] || [[word:chalolothoj|chalolothoj]] || [[word:chalolothosh|chalolothosh]] || [[word:chalolotho|chalolotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chalothoth|chalothoth]] || [[word:chalothoj|chalothoj]] || [[word:chalothosh|chalothosh]] || [[word:chalotho|chalotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chalofthoth|chalofthoth]] || [[word:chalofthoj|chalofthoj]] || [[word:chalofthosh|chalofthosh]] || [[word:chalofthof|chalofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chalothotho|chalothotho]] || [[word:chalothojo|chalothojo]] || [[word:chalothosho|chalothosho]] || [[word:chalothoko|chalothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chalothoth|chalothoth]] || [[word:chalothoj|chalothoj]] || [[word:chalothosh|chalothosh]] || [[word:chalotho|chalotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chalothothol|chalothothol]] || [[word:chalothojol|chalothojol]] || [[word:chalothoshol|chalothoshol]] || [[word:chalothokol|chalothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chalothothotho|chalothothotho]] || [[word:chalothojojo|chalothojojo]] || [[word:chalothoshosho|chalothoshosho]] || [[word:chalothoko|chalothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chalothothon|chalothothon]] || [[word:chalothojon|chalothojon]] || [[word:chalothoshon|chalothoshon]] || [[word:chalothokon|chalothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chalothothoro|chalothothoro]] || [[word:chalothojoro|chalothojoro]] || [[word:chalothoshoro|chalothoshoro]] || [[word:chalothokoro|chalothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
